summary: Nice‑sounding recording with a standout Phil vocal on Tom Thumb
review: The reviewer praises the overall sound quality, calling the show "nice sounding" and implying a clean mix. The performance is highlighted by Phil Lesh’s vocal delivery on Tom Thumb, which they consider one of his best. They anticipate rating it around four stars, indicating solid musical and technical merit.

ai_rating.rationale: Only a single review is available; the reviewer rates the show as roughly four stars and mentions good sound quality, leading to an estimated high‑mid rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer describes the recording as "nice sounding" with no noted issues; suggests a clear, balanced mix.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set pacing; overall positive impression.

band_member_comments.Phil: Phil sang Tom Thumb better than any other song – this one is really nice!
